scripts.invoke:github-token-provider: sam local invoke -t ./cdk.out/CdkEc2Stack.template.json GithubTokenProvider37618002 -e functions/github-token-provider/event.json --profile noxx --region us-west-2
scripts.deploy:ec2-dev: cdk deploy CdkEc2Stack --profile noxx --region us-west-2 -O output-dev.json
scripts.deploy:ec2-external: cdk deploy CdkEc2ExternalStack --profile noxx --region us-east-2 -O output-external.json
scripts.deploy:iam-cross-account-prod: cdk deploy OpenClawCrossAccountProd --profile noxx-prod --region us-west-2 -O output-prod-role.json
